Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests

Class TestGivenTypes

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.TestGivenTypes
public class TestGivenTypes extends AbstractTests
Tests for method Formula.getGivenTypes().
